lastSummary: Reviewed the past hour and found no new commits after the 1:03 PM EDT auto-sync push; HEAD remained at 82d6ccb while uncommitted local work included the new market-digest direction, a second test digest user profile, and routine digest-state/passive collection updates.

Recorded missing durable updates in today's daily note and task memory: haolun wants the market digest redesigned into denser shared/global plus personalized sections, and `ning` was added as a second test digest user without a watchlist or delivery target yet.

Re-reviewed both long-lived Discord branch state files against the importance rubric, found no shared-important promotions waiting, stamped fresh review metadata, and captured the latest passive 2:00 PM EDT market-digest collection state before rerunning automated sync.
